description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Bookmark an international AI-related conference in Europe taking place between September and December 2025 that offers a student registration option costing under 250 in registration currency.
tasks.name: Bookmark an international AI-related conference in Europe taking place between September and December 2025 that offers a student registration option costing under 250 in registration currency.

tasks.instruction: Within a single conference day, add 3 climate-related sessions scheduled between 09:00 and 17:00 from at least two different tracks to your personal schedule, then view your combined agenda.

target_names: Opening Keynote: Global Stocktake and Climate Policy
Parallel Session: Renewable Energy Auctions for Net-zero
Poster Session: Local Climate Action and Adaptation Plans

tasks.instruction: Follow a researcher whose expertise includes machine learning for healthcare, who is based in Canada and has an h-index between 30 and 60, then open your followed researchers list.

tasks.instruction: Add the first 3 open-access publications on renewable energy policy from 2021–2024 in journals with an impact factor above 5, sorted by most recent, to your reading list and then view your saved publications.

target_names: Designing Just Renewable Energy Subsidies: Evidence from the European Union
Urban Solar Policy Innovations: Overcoming Barriers to Rooftop PV Deployment
Renewable Energy Policy Mixes in Emerging Economies: Comparative Lessons from Brazil, India, and South Africa

tasks.instruction: Pre-register as a guest for a half-day data visualization workshop costing under 150 in registration currency, choosing a morning time slot if multiple sessions are available, and submit the form with sample contact details without completing any payment.

target_names: Hands-on Data Visualization with Open-Source Tools

tasks.instruction: Set up a one-time 75 USD donation fully allocated to a fund supporting early-career research grants, marking the donation as anonymous and opting out of physical mail, then stop just before entering any payment information.

tasks.instruction: Compare the individual student and professional membership plans, then start an application for whichever has the lower annual price while still including both member-only webinars and discounted conference fees, completing only the first step of the form without entering payment details.
